welcome.title: Hi, what's your plan for today?
welcome.placeholder: Send a message, upload files, open a folder, or create a scheduled task...
welcome.modelSwitchNotSupported: Model list will be available after first connection. Send a message to connect and load available models.
welcome.quickActionStar: Like us? Give us a star!

history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
history.exportDialogSingleDescription: Export current topic conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and workspace files into a ZIP package.
history.exportDialogBatchDescription: Export {{count}} selected topics' conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and workspace files into one ZIP package.
history.exportDialogHint: Folder selection follows the same interaction as workspace migration.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.pasteConfirm_message: Are you sure you want to paste '{{name}}' into the selected folder ({{target}})?
workspace.emptyDescription: Files will appear here after uploading files or opening a folder
workspace.createNewConversation: Create new chat in current workspace

migration.title: Change Workspace
migration.hint: Files will be moved to the new folder, chat history will not be lost
migration.description: Move temporary workspace files to a specified directory

workspace.dragOverlayDesc: Drag files or folders here to copy them into this workspace.
workspace.dragOverlayHint: Tip: drop anywhere to import into the selected folder.
workspace.dragNoFiles: No valid files detected. Please drag from Finder/Explorer.

contextMenu.deleteConfirm: This will delete the file from your system. Continue?
contextMenu.renameTimeout: Rename request timed out, please try again

chat.noModelSelected: No model selected for current session, cannot send message
chat.quotaExceededBody: The current model quota is exhausted. Switch to {{model}} to continue?
chat.quotaExceededNoFallback: Model quota reached. Please switch to another available model.
chat.apiErrorNoCli: API error occurred. No CLI agent available for fallback.

starOffice.stageChecking: 🧭 Progress: checking local environment and dependencies.
starOffice.stageDetecting: 🔎 Progress: detecting local port and reachable URL.
starOffice.stageCompleted: ✅ Progress: install and connect flow completed.
starOffice.flowCompletedNarration: Install and connection flow completed. Thank you. Install mode has exited automatically.
starOffice.flowCompletedTip: Star Office flow completed. Back to normal mode.
starOffice.channelNotReady: Send channel is not ready yet. I placed the request in the input box; click send and I will continue.
starOffice.autoRunFailed: Auto-run failed. I placed the request in the input box; click send and I will continue.
starOffice.helperReadyDiagnose: Star Office helper is ready. Running connection diagnosis / guidance in this conversation.
starOffice.detectedAndGuide: Detected local Star Office service ({{url}}). I will now guide connection and usage directly.
starOffice.helperReadyConsent: Star Office helper is ready. Waiting for your consent to auto-install.
starOffice.cardNotDetected: > No Star Office service was detected on this machine.
starOffice.cardWhatIsBullet1: - A local UI project that visualizes OpenClaw conversations
starOffice.cardWhatIsBullet2: - You can view real-time status and live interaction in the TV panel
starOffice.cardHelpBullet2: - Auto start service and detect port
starOffice.cardHelpBullet3: - Guide one-click connection to Aion live monitor
starOffice.cardConsentApprove: If you agree to start one-stop install now, reply: `Agree` (or `Continue`).
starOffice.flowStoppedTip: Stopped Star Office install flow. Conversation is back to normal mode.
starOffice.flowEndedWithoutSuccessNarration: This install/repair turn has ended, but connection success was not confirmed yet. Please click the TV icon to verify; if needed, run guided diagnose.
starOffice.flowEndedWithoutSuccessTip: Star Office flow ended. Verify in TV panel or run diagnose if still not connected.
starOffice.consentApproved: Consent received. I am now starting auto install/repair/start flow.
starOffice.consentRejected: Okay, this install flow is cancelled. You can tap the TV icon anytime to start again.
starOffice.waitingConsent: I am waiting for your confirmation. Please reply: `Agree` (or `Continue`) / `Cancel`.

preview.openclawMonitorDetectFailed: Monitor detection failed, click to configure manually
preview.openclawMonitorNotInstalled: No local monitor detected, click to install/connect
preview.openclawMonitorError: Detection failed. You can still input URL manually.
preview.openclawMonitorMissing: Star Office is not detected on this machine.
preview.openclawMonitorAssistPromptInstalled: Local Star Office service is detected ({{url}}). Enter "connect and usage guidance" mode directly: 1) confirm detection in one sentence; 2) guide me to click the TV icon and confirm URL; 3) explain Star Office + OpenClaw workflows; 4) if connection fails, run shortest diagnosis (port/process/logs) and retry.
preview.openclawMonitorInstallPrompt: User has authorized you to auto-run Star Office install/repair commands in this conversation (minimize manual shell input). Execute now: environment check -> auto install/repair (project: https://github.com/ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI) -> start service -> detect port -> guide clicking TV icon to verify. Only ask user when OS-level permission is strictly required.
preview.openclawMonitorDiagnosePrompt: Enter Star Office connection diagnosis mode (prefer no reinstall): check port conflicts, process status, auth/token, health checks and logs first; perform shortest fix automatically; re-detect and guide me to verify via TV icon.
preview.openclawMonitorVisualDesc: Star Office is a visual companion for OpenClaw. It turns chat-side status into a live, interactive monitor view.
preview.openclawMonitorVisualFallbackDesc: OpenClaw chat status becomes a visual office scene.
preview.openclawMonitorVisualImageCaptionFallbac: Preview image unavailable, open project for full screenshots.
preview.openclawMonitorHint: Input monitor URL manually, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:19000

skill_generator.title: Generate Skill/Rule
skill_generator.no_files: No relevant files found in workspace
skill_generator.name_required: Please enter a name for the preset
